hermes.goal: Beat buy-and-hold (positive alpha vs BTC) while keeping max drawdown under 15% and never risking the mandate on a single trade — capital preservation first. Near-term: prove a sustained, fee-aware, positive out-of-sample edge on the paper trainer over ~90 days before scaling any live capital; grow the live account only on demonstrated alpha.

brain.commentary: All four signals are flat with negative composites and, for three of them, beta > 1 and elevated volatility. Alpha is negative across the board, especially for LTC and SOL. The ensemble therefore warrants a defensive stance and a modest reduction in overall risk exposure. BTC shows the most stable beta and moderate volatility, so a tiny bullish tweak is acceptable. ETH, SOL and LTC exhibit fragile signals (high vol, negative alpha, low conviction) and merit small negative adjustments to keep net exposure tight and preserve liquidity.

counsellors.openai:
